title: HudEnhancer
description: Display, customize and move elements in the HUD.
body:
# HudEnhancer

HudEnhancer is a client-side FabricMC mod that allows the user to display, customize and move elements in the HUD.

**(pictures are old)**

### Included HUD Elements
- CPS
- FPS
- Position, Biome and Direction of the Player
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/175226db829e27738f78fad46e811044743270f8.png)

### Customization options
- adjust textcolor of elements
- set textshadow
- set background
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5baa8a1a9cdb53589eb3a69cb9a8b28c7eb96d54.png)

### Move Elements
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1378bf7fdf8d6bdbdc6f0fe8ad8693237e7d19.png)
